summary: Tested Huddle sports community app end-to-end. Backend: 25 pytest cases covering auth, users, swipe/match, matches CRUD/join/leave/capacity, teams CRUD/invite/regen/join, messages REST, and WebSocket chat broadcast — 25/25 passing (100%). Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): Login screen renders with HUDDLE branding + email/password/Google buttons; sign-in with alex.demo@huddle.app navigates to Discover; 6 match cards render in MATCHES list (>=3 seeded confirmed); toggle to PLAYERS shows react-native-deck-swiper stack with player cards + pass/like action buttons; tapping a match card navigates to /match/[id] showing detail (OPEN CHAT + leave button for already-joined matches); bottom tab nav with Discover/Matches/Teams/Chats/Profile is visible across screens; Teams tab loads with seeded TEST team and JOIN input; Profile tab shows Alex Rivera info, bio, location, skill, sports, and working signout icon; /match/create and /team/create forms render correctly.

issues: Leave button is an icon-only red button next to OPEN CHAT — consider a tooltip/label or explicit 'LEAVE' text for clarity on mobile (icon is the expo log-out icon, may be ambiguous to first-time users)

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add root testID to (tabs)/teams.tsx (testID="teams-screen"), (tabs)/profile.tsx (testID="profile-screen"), match/[id].tsx (testID="match-detail-screen"), match/create.tsx (testID="match-create-screen"), team/create.tsx (testID="team-create-screen") and match-join-button / match-leave-button / match-chat-button to make future automated tests more reliable. Current screenshots confirm functionality but is_visible() checks failed because root testID wrappers are missing on some screens.
OPTIONAL: Expo warning suggests expo-clipboard@56.0.3 expected ~8.0.8 — verify it's intentional or run `npx expo install --fix`.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') — should migrate to FastAPI lifespan context manager (minor, non-blocking).
WebSocket auth: no membership check — anyone with a valid JWT can join any match_id chat room. Consider enforcing that user is a participant of the match before accept/broadcast.
/api/users/swipe always inserts a new swipe doc even on repeat swipes from same swiper→target; consider upsert to prevent duplicates inflating the swipes collection.
CORS allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec and will be ignored by browsers — restrict origins or set allow_credentials=False.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing seeded users (alex.demo, maya.demo) and matches. Tests prefix transient data with TEST_ for easy identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All MVP features verified working. Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_huddle_backend.py covers REST + WebSocket. Public URL is read from EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL in frontend/.env. Use seed credentials alex.demo@huddle.app / password123. WebSocket URL pattern: wss://<host>/api/ws/chat/<match_id>?token=<jwt>.
